4.reason: [The comparator compares pointers instead of the integer values they point to. This causes the qsort to not sort the adjacency lists by vertex number, which violates the requirement to traverse neighbors in ascending order.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [The comparison function for qsort is incorrect. It should cast to int and subtract, not compare pointers directly. This leads to undefined behavior and incorrect sorting.]
